skills.name: goose-graphics
skills.description: Portable visual skill pack for the Agent Skills ecosystem (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Claude Cowork, Claude Design, Goose, Cursor, Codex). Discovers community-published styles + formats via the gooseworks CLI, runs an extract-style workflow on reference images, and exports rendered PNGs via Playwright.

features: Community-driven style catalog discovered via npx gooseworks styles list/search/get
Community-driven format catalog discovered via npx gooseworks formats list/search/get
Image-to-style extraction with publish to the central catalog
Author and publish a new graphics format spec to the Gooseworks catalog
Custom canvas dimensions (64–8192px) for surfaces beyond the seven defaults
Renders at least one example via the goose-graphics Playwright pipeline
Publishes via npx gooseworks formats publish
Reference image → fully installed style preset in one command
Generates all 7 format examples (poster, infographic, carousel, slides, story, chart, tweet) using a standard brief
Auto-renders PNGs via the goose-graphics Playwright pipeline
Registers the new style in styles/index.json and examples/manifest.json

skills.name: gtm-enrichment-deep

skills.name: gtm-enrichment-smart
skills.description: Multi-provider waterfall lead enrichment. Takes an email (+ optional name) and returns person + company data by cross-referencing cheap APIs first, using expensive AI agents only as fallback. Cost-efficient (~$0.04-$0.10/lead) with confidence scoring and full error visibility.
